productDisplayName: Nike Men's Sweet Classic Leather Grey White Shoe
description: If you want the ultimate sensation of comfort for your feet, then these Sweet Classic shoes from nike are for you. Designed for the tennis-lover, these shoes are a great combination of comfort and style. Team them with jeans and tees for a cool casual look.Upper Perforated synthetic uppers for superior breathability and protection Lace-ups for snug Fit Lightly cushioned collar and tongue for extra comfort Appliqued swoosh on the sides Appliqued logo on the tongue Embroidered logo on the back of collar Midsole EVA midsole for advanced cushioning Outsole Rubber outsole in herringbone pattern for superior traction and durability shoe careDo not machine washRemove dust and dirt with damp clean clothDo not store in direct sunlight
